name: Frontier
description:
The year is 1890, the era of cowboys and the Wild West is coming to an end.The year is 1890, the era of cowboys and the Wild West is coming to an end. Progress is inexorably consuming the territory of the western United States, and the actions of the Pinkerton agency and representatives of the law are becoming more structured and influential.

However, there are still small outlying towns that have not yet been greatly affected by progress, where various gangs of robbers and cowboys still operate, where the valleys and forests are still inhabited by a few tribes of Indians.

You arrive in one of these small towns built on the heels of a gold rush.You arrive in one of these small towns, built on the heels of a gold rush, with one single goal - revenge.
creator: Reesa Sinclair
